TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Folalacay == Oninian a folalacay hananay i, awaay iti:ni i niyaro' no mita masa'Amisay mala o pangch hanay kita oninian. Pakayni i kongko a kimad no to'as i, O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Rikisi no Folalacay O nikalopisak no Folalacay o itiniay i Folalacay no Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Folalacay a niyaro', makaala to 115 ko sa'osi no paro no loma', 278 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 145 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 133 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin O pitooran no finawlan O tahapinangan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj == o~uninian a fo~uɾaɾaʦaj ħananaj i, awaaj iti:ni i nijaro~uʡ no~u mita masaʡamisaj maɾa o~u paŋʦħ ħanaj kita o~uninian. pakajni i ko~uŋko~u a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u to~uʡas i, o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u rikisi no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~u itiniaj i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj no~u ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a nijaro~uʡ, makaaɾa to~u *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u taħapinaŋan
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Folalacay == Oninian a folalacay hananay i, awaay iti:ni i niyaro' no mita masa'Amisay mala o pangch hanay kita oninian. Pakayni i kongko a kimad no to'as i, O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Rikisi no Folalacay O nikalopisak no Folalacay o itiniay i Folalacay no Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Folalacay a niyaro', makaala to 115 ko sa'osi no paro no loma', 278 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 145 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 133 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, Bunun 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin O pitooran no finawlan O tahapinangan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj == o~uninian a fo~uɾaɾaʦaj ħananaj i, awaaj iti:ni i nijaro~uʡ no~u mita masaʡamisaj maɾa o~u paŋʦħ ħanaj kita o~uninian. pakajni i ko~uŋko~u a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u to~uʡas i, o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u rikisi no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj o~u itiniaj i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj no~u ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj a nijaro~uʡ, makaaɾa to~u *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u taħapinaŋan
